entities.name: Preparation of the way
entities.raw_quote: eight are preparation of the way to work

entities.name: Friday Fasting
entities.raw_quote: one Friday, after sincerely repenting and confessing, you must fast on bread and water.

entities.name: Morning Twilight Prayer
entities.raw_quote: In the early morning around morning twilight, say the ten prayers... pleasantly and attentively

entities.name: Lunar Cycle Ritual
entities.raw_quote: Deinde prima luna, scilicet in die Lune sequenti, fac ut prius penitus et eodem modo similiter luna 2a et luna 3a et luna 4a

entities.name: Charity/Almsgiving

attributes.action: give three alms to three poor people

entities.raw_quote: Si autem repulsam habueris... debes dare tres elemosinas tribus pauperibus

summary: This chunk contains long lists of divine, angelic, and demonic names organized into 'Termini' (Ends) for specific ritual stages. It also provides detailed instructions on the timing, fasting, and spiritual state required for performing these prayers, including protocols for handling prayer rejection.
key_passages: eight are preparation of the way to work, and preparation of the work for obtaining
The eight prayers are placed at the end, which are called the eight Termini (or “Ends”), and regarding them I say, that they are effective for obtaining divine consent.
one Friday, after sincerely repenting and confessing, you must fast on bread and water.
In the early morning around morning twilight, say the ten prayers... pleasantly and attentively, while projecting the words purposefully.
Si autem repulsam habueris... debes dare tres elemosinas tribus pauperibus misericorditer et devote.
